rationale: Mentova is a crypto education app. The requested 'innovative, dynamic, modern' vibe aligns perfectly with Archetype 7, but we are grounding it using E1's 'Black-on-Black' protocol. Deep dark navy (#06060F) serves as the endless void. Purple (#7C3AED) and Green (#00D9A5) are treated as kinetic triggers—used only for active states, gradients, and critical actions. We avoid flat, lifeless interfaces by integrating floating particles, glowing orbs, and glassmorphic 'Crystal' cards with 1px tactile borders.

typography.guidelines: Do NOT use generic Inter for headings. We demand high-tension typography. Since this is React Native and custom fonts might not be pre-loaded, assume system fallbacks if needed, but structure the styles as if a strong geometric display sans is used.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mobile-first, generous padding. Cards do not touch the screen edges.

hero.structure: Animated M logo center-top, Tagline badge above the Title, H1 Title, Subtitle.
hero.taglineBadge: Tiny pill shape, border 1px solid rgba(0, 217, 165, 0.3), text #00D9A5. Uppercase, tracking wide.
hero.title: Massive text. Can use green or purple text-shadow or linear-gradient overlay if possible.

statsBar.structure: Horizontal row of 3 small bento items. '9+ Pro Tools', '24/7 AI Active', '3 Languages'.
statsBar.style: Glass surface. Number/Icon highlighted in Primary/Accent color. Deep padding.

featureCards.structure: 4 cards (AI Trading, Pro Charts, Verified Mentors, Community). Auto-rotate carousel or stack.
featureCards.style: Crystal variant glassmorphism. Background rgba(255,255,255,0.03), 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05). Internal glowing icon.
featureCards.activeState: Border becomes Purple, subtle drop shadow.

buttons.primary: Solid #7C3AED background. Text #FFFFFF. Bold, large hit area. Subtext '→ register'.
buttons.secondary: Transparent. Text rgba(255,255,255,0.7). No border or extremely subtle border. Subtext '→ login'.
buttons.trustBadges: Muted text beneath the buttons (security, encryption). 12px.

motion_and_interactions.background: Use expo-linear-gradient as absolute-positioned giant blurred orbs (width 300, height 300, borderRadius 150) in top-right (purple) and bottom-left (green) with low opacity (0.15) to simulate glowing space.
motion_and_interactions.cards: Use React Native Animated API for the auto-rotate functionality.
motion_and_interactions.logo: Pulsing or floating animation via Animated.loop and Animated.sequence on the Y-axis.

image_urls.description: Abstract 3D crypto element for potential visual flair inside feature cards or as a subtle background header image.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use pure React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, StyleSheet, Animated) since this is an Expo export.
Do NOT use DOM elements like <div> or <span>.
All code must be in .js files (no .tsx).
Use expo-linear-gradient for background gradients and glowing orbs.
Use Ionicons from @expo/vector-icons (or react-native-vector-icons) for all UI iconography.

For Glassmorphism in React Native: use backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' with a border. You cannot easily use backdrop-blur in pure RN without expo-blur, so simulate it with low-opacity dark/light fills.
MANDATORY: Add testID AND data-testid attributes to all interactive and key informational elements for automated testing (e.g., testID='hero-title' data-testid='hero-title').
